description: A screenshot of a Fox News article header. Below the Fox News logo and a red 'JOE BIDEN' tag, a bold black headline reads 'DHS nabs Afghan man admitted under Biden after conviction for exposing himself to minor'. A subheading quotes a DHS official, and a byline and publication date of March 16, 2026 appear at the bottom.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; JOE BIDEN; DHS nabs Afghan man admitted under Biden after conviction for exposing himself to minor; Published March 16, 2026
